things.name: Copan Ruins Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Maya city with exquisite carved stelae 3 hours west

things.name: Parque Central & Cathedral
things.description: Colonial park and 16th-century cathedral at the heart of the commercial capital

things.name: Museo de Antropologia e Historia
things.description: Pre-Columbian artefacts from Maya to colonial Honduras in a restored mansion

things.name: Cusuco National Park
things.description: Cloud forest 20km from the city with resplendent quetzals and rare wildlife

things.name: Lake Yojoa Day Trip
things.description: Honduras's only natural lake with birds, waterfalls and D&D Brewery

things.name: Cascadas Los Chorros
things.description: Series of waterfalls in the mountains near San Pedro Sula

things.name: Circuito Artesanal del Valle de Sula
things.description: Craft route through Lenca villages with pottery, leather and basketweaving

things.name: Roatan Island Diving
things.description: Caribbean island 1-hour flight with world-class barrier reef diving

things.name: Baleada Super
things.description: Honduras's street food king - flour tortilla loaded with beans, cream, cheese and egg
